content: When comparing curiosity-driven intrinsic reward methods (ICM, RND) to general curious RL agents, the open-ended exploratory gap between methods and agents mirrors the gap between an agent’s stored episodic memory and its active retrieval of novel, high-value memory traces in 2024–2025 SOTA active memory architectures. We can frame intrinsic reward scaling as a function of how well a curiosity method prunes outdated low-value exploration traces in the agent’s working memory rather than just generating new prediction error bonuses.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
